query: Our orders list query takes 2.3 seconds. It joins users, orders, and line_items and filters by status and date range.
expected_behavior: Requests the EXPLAIN ANALYZE output before recommending any index change
Identifies that composite indexes on (status, created_at) are likely needed for the filter conditions
Checks whether the FK columns (user_id on orders, order_id on line_items) have indexes
Does not recommend denormalization without a benchmark proving it is necessary
Produces the specific CREATE INDEX statement with the correct column order
